label: 第239話
source_locator: 単行本27巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 羂索は死滅回游の残存参加者を狩る中、髙羽史彦と遭遇する。髙羽の術式が現実を書き換え、羂索は予測不能な喜劇へ巻き込まれる。
summary_full: 羂索は死滅回游の残存参加者を狩る中、髙羽史彦と遭遇する。髙羽の術式が現実を書き換え、羂索は予測不能な喜劇へ巻き込まれる。羂索は死滅回游の終結に向け泳者を殺害して回るが、髙羽の超人は想像した笑いを現実化する。羂索の知識と戦闘経験では処理できない喜劇が始まる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: While the jujutsu sorcerers are focused on the showdown in 新宿 with 宿儺 , 羂索 hunts down the remaining 死滅回游 players. Everything continues according to his plan until he runs into a comedian primed to steal the show.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 羂索 hunts down the remaining 死滅回游 players. In Lake Gosho Colony in Iwate Prefecture, an incarnated female 死滅回游 player worries about the new rules added to the battle royal. As she runs into a forest, she wonders out loud, calling 羂索 cruel for giving incarnated players like her a second chance at life only to take it away. Suddenly, a slime-like curse appears over her head and begins to suffocate her. The culprit, 羂索 , suddenly appears sitting on a nearby tree. He tells the player that he has no emotional attachment towards the incarnated players and compares them to seasoning and water. The woman attacks him by twisting her hair into a drill and firing it at him. 羂索 disappears before the projectile hits and solidifies the curse on the player's head into stone, weighing her down to the ground. As she desperately tries to remove the curse, 羂索 walks toward her while commenting on how he detests needless waste. He flicks the curse with his fingers, sending a shockwave through the stone that kills the sorcerer. Standing over the woman's corpse, 羂索 talks to himself as if he's still speaking to her, explaining how he can track incarnated players through their cursed objects and awakened players through their cursed seals. He points out that the incarnated players were reluctant to leave their colonies since adapting to society and getting hunted down were both unattractive options. 羂索 attacks 庵 黄櫨折. 庵 黄櫨折 approaches 羂索 while noting that the woman is already dead. He mockingly asks if 羂索 talks to himself due to his longevity. 羂索 explains that it is due to him not having many friends left and offers friendship to 黄櫨折, who sarcastically accepts. 羂索 then says that 黄櫨折 must fulfill two conditions to be his friend: he must never bore him, and he must be his equal. Realizing that 羂索 thought he was serious, 黄櫨折 reveals that he was joking earlier, to 羂索's disappointment. 羂索 then takes out his phone and watches the conclusion to 五条悟 's battle showdown 宿儺 . He commends 宿儺 after noticing that the King of Curses killed 悟 by extending the target of his 術式 . 黄櫨折, who also watches the finale of the fight on his phone, is disappointed that 悟 lost since now he has no backup against 羂索. 羂索 retorts him, revealing that he used barrier techniques to conceal 呪霊 around himself and 新宿, which act as surveillance for the total 呪力 volume of all the sorcerers in the city. This allows him to monitor the sorcerers and know when even one of them leaves, especially 乙骨憂太 . Additionally, since he also shares vision with the 呪霊, he can track 禪院真希 who possesses no 呪力, and 憂憂 who he speculates possesses a 術式 that allows him to teleport. "Don't you want to see what you haven't seen?" 黄櫨折 makes fun of 羂索's preparedness, asking if he lacks confidence in his abilities to fight him. 羂索 instead states that it means the two are alone. A swarm of 呪霊 suddenly rush out of the forest and charge 黄櫨折 as 羂索 asks if the incarnated sorcerer really thought he could hold him off until help arrived. 黄櫨折 removes a tooth and detonates it, causing a massive explosion in the forest that destroys the curses. A large curse then appears to his side, causing him to remove his eye and throw it but the curse swallows the eye and contains the explosion in its gut. While 黄櫨折 is still occupied with this curse and regenerates his eye with 反転術式 術式 , he's flanked by a swarm of small flying curses. 羂索 walks towards 黄櫨折 and explains that he was aware of 黄櫨折の ability to use 反転術式 術式, which is why he targeted his head. As he mocks 黄櫨折の shoddiness despite being a reincarnated player, it is revealed that the small curses stabbed their proboscis-like appendages through 黄櫨折の neck, preventing him from healing his body from the neck down. 高羽 arrives in "Hakodate". 黄櫨折 resentfully asks 羂索 why he is killing players. 羂索 explains that he needs to kill all the players to end the 死滅回游 due to a 縛り . By ending the 死滅回游, he would be able to merge the people of Japan with 天元 . 黄櫨折 is unable to understand 羂索's motives, who reveals that he believes life is about seeing what one hasn't seen, and confirming what one thinks is interesting in imagination is interesting in real life. Still unable to understand, 黄櫨折 insults 羂索 one last time before being killed. Shortly after, 羂索 exits the forest and notices 高羽史彦 running down the road towards him. 高羽 expresses his relief for finally arriving in Iwate, mistakingly calling it Hakodate . 羂索 corrects him before summoning curses to attack 高羽, all the while wondering why the sorcerers sent the comedian of all people to fight him alone. As the curses seemingly kill 高羽, 羂索 laments the boringness of awakened players, who he only used to fill out the roster. 日車寛見 is the sole exception in his opinion. 高羽 unaffected by 羂索's attack. However, as the smoke clears, 高羽 reveals he's not only alive but completely unharmed. Angered about the attack, he threatens to have 羂索 imprisoned. 羂索 is perplexed by the unknown feeling of his attack having no effect despite hitting 高羽. 高羽 then states that the most thrilling thing in the world is when comedians who are only there to pad out the cast end up stealing the show, a stament 羂索 agrees with.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 名称不明 Female 死滅回游 Player 羂索 庵 黄櫨折 五条悟 (画像) 宿儺 (画像) 乙骨憂太 (言及のみ) 禪院真希 (言及のみ) 冥冥 (言及のみ) 憂憂 (言及のみ) 高羽史彦
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 庵 黄櫨折 vs. 羂索 高羽史彦 vs. 羂索 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: Cursed 術式 名称不明 Sorcerer's Hair Drill 術式 高羽史彦の術式 超人 庵 黄櫨折 's 術式 庵 黄櫨折の Explosive Flesh 術式 反転術式 術式 羂索の術式 呪霊操術

key_events_verified_phase11: 羂索は死滅回游の残存参加者を狩る中、髙羽史彦と遭遇する。
髙羽の術式が現実を書き換え、羂索は予測不能な喜劇へ巻き込まれる。
羂索は死滅回游の終結に向け泳者を殺害して回るが、髙羽の超人は想像した笑いを現実化する。
羂索の知識と戦闘経験では処理できない喜劇が始まる。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
